### P2-B2 — Origin-Capture Taxonomy  (✅ PASS)

**Headline:** 1/5 SAGA-blocked; 4 reach CAPM

**Key metrics:**
- typosquatting: diff=2, SAGA-blk=True, detect=High, ASR_PF=0.0
- stale_allowlist: diff=3, SAGA-blk=False, detect=Medium, ASR_PF=1.0
- credential_leak: diff=4, SAGA-blk=False, detect=Low, ASR_PF=1.0
- legitimate_origin_compromise: diff=5, SAGA-blk=False, detect=Low, ASR_PF=1.0
- trust_bootstrap_abuse: diff=3, SAGA-blk=False, detect=Medium, ASR_PF=1.0

**Figures:** [b2_risk_matrix.png](../figures/b2_risk_matrix.png), [b2_capture_depth.png](../figures/b2_capture_depth.png)

### P2-B3 — WGOT — Warrant-Guided Origin Targeting  (✅ PASS)

**Headline:** WGOT ASR 0.446 vs random 0.166 (mean over ρ)

**Key metrics:**
- mean ASR — WGOT 0.446, max_warrant 0.357, min_cost 0.311, random 0.166
- WGOT dominates at every ρ; advantage peaks at ρ≈0

**Figures:** [b3_asr_vs_correlation.png](../figures/b3_asr_vs_correlation.png), [b3_asr_vs_budget.png](../figures/b3_asr_vs_budget.png)

### P2-B4 — Residual-Risk Cartography  (✅ PASS)

**Headline:** avg collapse 0.121 (~19×); top-3 cover 73%

**Key metrics:**
- avg collapse ratio 0.121 (≈19× surface reduction)
- avg top-3 chokepoint coverage 73%
- star_hub: collapse 0.2983, top3 0.8567
- deep_chain: collapse 0.0455, top3 0.6232
- wide_fan: collapse 0.0303, top3 0.8504
- multi_org_mesh: collapse 0.1083, top3 0.6082

**Figures:** [b4_surface_collapse.png](../figures/b4_surface_collapse.png), [b4_chokepoint_coverage.png](../figures/b4_chokepoint_coverage.png)

### P2-W5 — Generality beyond the lattice  (✅ PASS)

**Headline:** 7/7 monotone contain; control ASR=0.70

**Key metrics:**
- monotone models contained 7/7
- non-monotone control ASR 0.70 (leaks)
- lattice h3/5/7/10 + continuous linear/convex/concave

**Figures:** [w5_asr_by_model.png](../figures/w5_asr_by_model.png), [w5_containment_utility.png](../figures/w5_containment_utility.png)

### P2-B5 — Adaptive capture under partial knowledge  (✅ PASS)

**Headline:** blind 0.31 → probed 0.46 (oracle 0.46)

**Key metrics:**
- perfect-knowledge WGOT 0.46, random 0.17
- blind (0 probes) 0.31 = min-cost degenerate
- well-probed 0.46 → reaches oracle bound

**Figures:** [b5_partial_knowledge.png](../figures/b5_partial_knowledge.png)

### P2-B6 — Detection / second-order boundary  (✅ PASS)

**Headline:** TPR naive 0.97 / gradual 0.66 @ FPR 0.02

**Key metrics:**
- operating @ threshold 2.25: TPR_naive 0.97, TPR_gradual 0.66, FPR 0.02
- naive caught, gradual evades; detector raises cost, can't close residual

**Figures:** [b6_tpr_fpr_threshold.png](../figures/b6_tpr_fpr_threshold.png), [b6_roc.png](../figures/b6_roc.png)
